summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Reeve landing page redesign. All major features working correctly: page loads without errors, all sections render, theme toggle works, navigation links scroll correctly, CTAs have proper hrefs, copy buttons show 'Copied' confirmation, simulate toggle reveals NY node with SUPERSEDES chain, responsive design has no horizontal overflow at 1920px/1280px/390px viewports.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features tested and working: theme toggle (dark/light with localStorage persistence), nav anchor links, hero CTAs, code copy buttons, simulate toggle for memory evolution demo, responsive design. No backend APIs - purely static frontend. Clipboard copy shows 'Copied' confirmation but actual clipboard access may fail in automated test environments due to browser permissions.

features_tested.page_load: PASS - Page loads at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL without errors
features_tested.all_sections_render: PASS - Hero, Problem, How It Works, Memory Evolves, Architecture, Five Layers, Features Bento, Quick Start, Footer all render
features_tested.theme_toggle: PASS - Clicking switches between dark/light mode, html tag gets 'dark' class toggled, colors visibly change
features_tested.theme_persistence: PASS - Theme preference persists via localStorage key 'reeve-theme'
features_tested.nav_anchor_links: PASS - All nav links (problem, how, architecture, features, quickstart) scroll to correct sections
features_tested.hero_ctas: PASS - Primary CTA opens docs (href=https://reeve.co.in/docs, target=_blank), Secondary scrolls to #quickstart
features_tested.code_copy_buttons: PASS - Copy buttons show 'Copied' confirmation and reset after timeout
features_tested.simulate_toggle: PASS - Clicking reveals NY node with SUPERSEDES chain, updates query output, clicking again resets
features_tested.problem_cards: PASS - All 3 problem cards render with proper content
features_tested.feature_bento_cards: PASS - All 7 feature cards render (3lane, supersede, landmark, mcp, tkg, entity, lifespan)
features_tested.ticker_marquee: PASS - Renders with all 8 expected terms
features_tested.contrast_issues: PASS - No dark-text-on-dark-background issues in either theme
features_tested.responsive_390px: PASS - No horizontal overflow, nav links hidden as expected
